About EPC

LOCAL.
RELIABLE.
THOROUGH.

Eryk's Pressure Cleaning is a Mitcham-based exterior cleaning business built on doing the job properly. No rushing, no shortcuts — just clean results you can be proud of.

Every job is done using professional-grade equipment and eco-friendly cleaning products that are safe for your family, your garden, and the environment.

  • Fully insured — public liability covered on every job
  • Eco-friendly products, no harsh chemicals near your plants or drains
  • Honest, upfront pricing — you'll know the cost before we start
  • Local to Mitcham — fast response, no long waits
  • All surfaces treated with the right pressure and technique

"Transforming tired outdoor spaces one driveway at a time."

What We Clean

OUR SERVICES

Professional exterior cleaning for homes across South London. All jobs include a free assessment and honest quote before any work begins.

Driveways

Remove years of oil, moss, algae and traffic grime from concrete, tarmac and resin-bound driveways. We restore the original colour and texture safely.

Block Paving

Specialist cleaning for block paving that removes blackspot, weeds and discolouration without disturbing the jointing sand or damaging the surface.

Patios & Decking

From stone and Indian sandstone to timber decking, we apply the right pressure and technique for each surface — no damage, just a deep clean.

Fences & Walls

We clean panel fences, brick walls, rendered surfaces and boundary walls — removing green algae, lichen and weathering to restore a fresh, clean look.

How It Works

SIMPLE PROCESS

01

Get in Touch

Call, text or fill in the contact form. Tell us what you need cleaned and whereabouts you are.

02

Free Quote

We'll give you a clear, no-obligation price before any work starts. No hidden fees, no surprises.

03

We Clean

We arrive on time, protect the surrounding area, and get the job done properly from start to finish.

04

You're Happy

We don't leave until you're satisfied. Clean surfaces, no mess left behind, job done.

The Person Behind EPC

MEET ERYK

It started at home. I grabbed a pressure washer to clean my own driveway and something clicked — watching years of grime disappear and seeing a surface come back to life was genuinely satisfying in a way I hadn't expected.

I started noticing it everywhere. Driveways caked in moss. Patios that hadn't been touched in years. Fences gone green. And around Mitcham, barely anyone offering to fix it. That gap felt like an opportunity — but more than that, it felt like something worth doing.

EPC isn't a faceless company. It's me, Eryk, showing up on time, doing the job properly, and not leaving until it looks right. I take genuine pride in every driveway I clean because I know how much of a difference it makes to a home — I felt it myself.

When you book with EPC you're not getting a call centre or a stranger in an unmarked van. You're getting someone local who cares about the work, cares about your property, and wants you to look at your driveway afterwards and think "that looks brilliant."

Eryk — Founder, EPC

Got Questions?

Q & A

EPC is based in Mitcham and covers the local surrounding area on foot — including Tooting, Morden, Colliers Wood, Norbury, Pollards Hill and Figge's Marsh. Not sure if you're close enough? Just give us a call or drop us a message and we'll let you know.

It depends on the size of the area. A standard driveway typically takes 1–2 hours. A larger patio or multiple surfaces might take 3–4 hours. We'll give you a realistic time estimate when we quote so you know exactly what to expect on the day.

Yes. We use eco-friendly cleaning products that are safe for plants, grass, pets and children. We're also careful about where water and runoff goes during the job so your garden beds and lawns are protected throughout.

Not necessarily, but I do need access to a power source at the start of the job. If you're home when I arrive and can let me get set up, you're welcome to head out after that — no need to stay for the whole thing. Many customers do exactly that. I'll always confirm access arrangements beforehand and message you when the job is done.

Simple — fill in the quote request form on this page, send us an email at enquiries@erykspressurecleaning.co.uk, or call us directly on 07894 259 471. We'll get back to you quickly with a price and available dates. No obligation, no pressure.
